scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/core && npm run test -w packages/vscode
scripts.package: npm run build && cd packages/vscode && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies
scripts.postinstall: cd packages/vscode/node_modules && ln -sf ../../../node_modules/node-pty node-pty 2>/dev/null || true; chmod +x node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-*/spawn-helper 2>/dev/null || true
